{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324000801A2A9D9B4113C9815D6AA\"}"},"total":212},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7234792746593764100","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"算是鬼故事之中的佳作了，后面希望保持住，加油","text_exts":[{"e":5,"s":2,"text":"鬼故事","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%AC%BC%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742820819815D6AA%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227234792746593764100%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227220320575955143714%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%AC%BC%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684481572,"group_id":"7220320575955143714","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9KSu6AI7kSWqJYnZ1zq5DNo4ptvMY4elYvwcWy+alvp","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1234065213890283","user_name":"鲁笪斳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1234065213890283","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_info":{"abstract":"在我出生当天，晴空万里突变电闪雷鸣，一个惊雷劈在我家树上，村里人都认为我的出生是不祥之兆，对我避之不及，村里一人不小心得罪了我，晚上便离奇上吊自杀，必须要跪我才能取下尸体，在他出殡之日，兄弟横死，棺材落地，一切故事因此展开……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fb6576a85e8d6b0d3fa2d55aba88f1de","author":"清风浮云","author_id":"","book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_name":"最后一个捉鬼阴阳师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":100,\"name\":\"灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100\u0026name=灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7220320656963928616","read_count":"928","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1077415"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"531","tags":"悬疑灵异,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/77c13330aa4ff9a3fa85baf9148e4d89~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779466081\u0026x-signature=vYguhKAFwlo8r%2B%2FHHYr2pIEXRCY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52418552287","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.107291e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260324000801A2A9D9B4113C9815D6AA\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":39630,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41737,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1851},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1684481749,"author_reply_time":1684481769,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7346532876836324121","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错，既悬疑恐怖，又不失幽默搞笑。最好的一点是无后宫，我个人不太喜欢看那种感情线太多的小说，更何况是恐怖小说。这点作者很棒👍🏻。结尾稍微有点草草结束了，穿插的一些剧情人物没有交代了。希望作者改善下，写出更好的恐怖小说，我一定继续追，加油！","text_exts":[{"e":57,"s":53,"text":"恐怖小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742820819815D6AA%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227346532876836324121%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227220320575955143714%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710500087,"group_id":"7220320575955143714","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N72ue5hKLKynBPlcC7Bxxn0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"962819664917512","user_name":"无天佛祖🙏🏻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"962819664917512","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_info":{"abstract":"在我出生当天，晴空万里突变电闪雷鸣，一个惊雷劈在我家树上，村里人都认为我的出生是不祥之兆，对我避之不及，村里一人不小心得罪了我，晚上便离奇上吊自杀，必须要跪我才能取下尸体，在他出殡之日，兄弟横死，棺材落地，一切故事因此展开……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fb6576a85e8d6b0d3fa2d55aba88f1de","author":"清风浮云","author_id":"","book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_name":"最后一个捉鬼阴阳师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type 714","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱阅读，爱小说。大家一起在这里成长！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NysZR4+DUVyvxUzrEJ+UDs/AS+ltXowTBlMKCdAKQ69q","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3566406842461326","user_name":"用户35664068"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3566406842461326","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716557415,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFD99F","can_worn":false,"id":12,"name":"2023年度报告","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c054ea1e4c358115a56b7e29090c7e3","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c054ea1e4c358115a56b7e29090c7e3"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_info":{"abstract":"在我出生当天，晴空万里突变电闪雷鸣，一个惊雷劈在我家树上，村里人都认为我的出生是不祥之兆，对我避之不及，村里一人不小心得罪了我，晚上便离奇上吊自杀，必须要跪我才能取下尸体，在他出殡之日，兄弟横死，棺材落地，一切故事因此展开……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fb6576a85e8d6b0d3fa2d55aba88f1de","author":"清风浮云","author_id":"","book_id":"7220320575955143714","book_name":"最后一个捉鬼阴阳师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authori
